violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Condensation ice build up on multiple food boxes in walk in freezer.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Residential stove/oven in back prep area not provided with hood.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Detail cleaning needed to reach in coolers on cook line. Dunnage rack in walk in cooler have build up of food/mold and are in need of cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors in walk in cooler and walk in freezer have build up of food debris under shelving and dunnage racks. Needs cleaning. Floors under line equipment need cleaning.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Floor tiles in walk in cooler broken/missing. Needs repair. Exposed insulation in dry storage room.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. East entry door leading into dry storage room has large gaps at threshold. Not maintained in good condition.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Cardboard used as liner for dunnage racks in walk in cooler. Stained and spotting.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Residential style stove/oven in BOH prep area not provided with hood.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Dunnage racks in walk in cooler have a build-up of food debris and mold spotting.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. Use test strips on a daily basis to ensure proper chemical sanitizing concentrations are maintained.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical ware washing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. Dish machine chemical sanitizer concentrations not maintained at proper levels.--Ware wash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. Dish machine chemical sanitizing concentrations not maintained at proper levels. Noted on previous inspections.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning under cooking line equipment and under shelving units in walk in cooler.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Floors tiles in walk in cooler broken/missing in spots.

General premises. — --Observed traffic of unauthorized person through food preparation, food storage or ware washing area. East entry door for food deliveries also used by customers. Passes through storage room.
Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. Meatballs on steam table being held at 105-110 degrees F.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Backflow prevention, back siphonage (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
